description:
A desktop app for ComfyUI, the most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface

ComfyUI Desktop is a packaged way to use ComfyUI and comes bundled with a few things:
- Stable version of ComfyUI from releases
- ComfyUI_frontend
- ComfyUI-Manager
- uv
On startup, it will install all the necessary python dependencies with uv and start the ComfyUI server. The app will automatically update with stable releases of ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Manager, and the uv executable as well as some desktop specific features.
What's Changed
- [CI] Update build patcher - throw on fail, extensible by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1042
- [CI] Fix regression - all command output discarded by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1043
- Bump axios from 1.7.9 to 1.8.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1047
- Update ComfyUI Manager by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1048
- Update Frontend v1.11.8 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1034
- Use ComfyUI branch with commit for ignoring FE pip package. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1044
- v0.4.30 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1050
- Remove patch step since make:assets already runs it. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1051
- Fixed: Add ComfyUI desktop version environment variable. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1054
- Fixed: User gets stuck in Desktop Updating page when error occurs by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1055
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/compare/v0.4.29...v0.4.30
